meaning: n.混乱,混沌(宇宙未形成前的情形)
examples: He was ultimately overthrown and the country descended into chaos.
The storms and torrential rain caused traffic chaos across the country.
The world's first transatlantic balloon race ended in chaos last night.
And today all the last-minute chaos has been given a whole new dimension because of the snow.
The city's descent into chaos appears to have no heroes, only villains and victims.
